TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Mike_Bantom, title = Mike_Bantom, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mike_Bantom} }

S.FORM: Mike Bantom 12 bulad 3 demiad, 1951 a mihca, Mike Bantom, miunduay.
S.PHON: mikə bantom ** bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, mikə bantom, miunduaj.
